title: Duplicate item/subitem and move to group or board
excerpt: Add “Duplicate and move to group or board” for items/subitems. Remove “(copy)” from the item name.

posts.author: kkyrrolla (Kyle Robert Lawson)
posts.cookedHtml: Add “Duplicate and move to group or board” for items/subitems. Remove “(copy)” from the item name.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kyle,

Duplicating an item (with the subitem) and moving it to a different group/board is currently supported in the platform using automations. I wanted to check if your request was specific to removing the word copy for the duplicate item’s name?
